widgets.description: All widgets that can appear on the dashboard. Hidden ones are listed in the Add Widget panel.

layouts.description: Controlled per-breakpoint layouts: { lg: WidgetLayout[], md: ..., ... }. Pair with onLayoutChange.

defaultLayouts.description: Initial per-breakpoint layouts (uncontrolled). Auto-generated if omitted.

onLayoutChange.description: Fires on every layout, visibility, collapse, maximize, preset or reset change.

breakpoints.description: Custom breakpoint definitions: { key, minWidth, columns, label? }.

rowHeight.description: Pixel height of one grid row.

margin.description: Horizontal and vertical gap between widgets in pixels.

containerPadding.description: Padding inside the grid container in pixels.

minWidgetWidth.description: Minimum column span for any widget.

minWidgetHeight.description: Minimum row span for any widget.

editMode.description: Controlled edit mode. When true, drag/resize handles and toolbar actions are enabled.

onEditModeChange.description: Fires when the user toggles edit mode.

persistKey.description: localStorage key for automatic save/restore of the full DashboardLayoutState.

presets.description: Named layout presets to expose in the toolbar Presets menu.

onPresetChange.description: Fires when the user selects a preset.

showToolbar.description: Show the built-in toolbar (Edit, Add Widget, Reset, Presets).

toolbarTitle.description: Title rendered on the left of the toolbar (also used as the grid's aria-label).

toolbarSlotStart.description: Custom content rendered after the toolbar title.

toolbarSlotEnd.description: Custom content rendered before the Edit button on the right side of the toolbar.

addWidgetLabel.description: Override the Add Widget button label.

compactType.description: Auto-compaction direction after drag/resize. null disables compaction.

allowOverlap.description: Allow widgets to overlap (skip collision push-down).

emptyState.description: Custom empty state when there are no visible widgets.

locale.description: Override any built-in toolbar / action label.

className.description: Class name applied to the outer wrapper.

style.description: Inline styles for the outer wrapper.

widgetClassName.description: Class name applied to every widget surface.

id.description: Unique widget id; referenced by layouts and presets.

title.description: Widget title shown in the header bar and Add Widget panel.

description.description: Short description shown in the Add Widget panel.

category.description: Optional grouping label for future categorization.

headerActions.description: Custom icons / buttons / dropdowns rendered to the left of the built-in widget actions (refresh, settings, collapse, maximize, remove). Wrap them in elements with class `eui-dashboard-widget-action` to inherit the built-in button styling, or use your own controls. Pointer events inside this slot do not trigger drag.

renderSettings.description: Render-prop for the per-widget settings popover. Setting this enables the gear icon.

onRefresh.description: Setting this enables the refresh icon. While the promise is pending the icon spins.

loading.description: Force the loading overlay independent of refresh state.

error.description: Display an error block in place of the body content.

lastUpdated.description: Shown in the widget footer as 'Updated: …'.

badge.description: Pill rendered next to the widget title.

defaultCollapsed.description: Start with the body collapsed to just the header.

hidden.description: Initial visibility. Hidden widgets appear in the Add Widget panel.

canDrag.description: Allow the user to drag this widget.

canResize.description: Allow the user to resize this widget.

canRemove.description: Allow the user to hide this widget.

canCollapse.description: Allow the user to collapse this widget.

canMaximize.description: Allow the user to maximize this widget.
